creator: peter@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for the reminder.  This was in the first email I sent in the "RIP GNATS" thread:

"The bugzilla url requires a trailing / - everything else still redirects to 
gnats, this is intentional for a short while longer."

The scaffolding is kind of temporary and needs some help from the doc folks.  Luckily I know where to find a doc / www person :)
